marketName: Data Processing, Hosting, and Related Services

assessments.rationale: CDU secondary loop uses water or PG/EG25 glycol blend — aqueous media with <=50% glycol fits the sensor envelope directly.
Facility CHW 14-27 degC; Rubin-class secondary TCS supply 20-45 degC. Maximum ~45 degC is half the 90 degC limit.
Closed, de-aerated CDU loop with expansion reservoir holds void fraction well below 2%.
CDU loops run steady-state. Integrated NTC compensation delivers ~0.2% accuracy — adequate for thermal-duty and PUE telemetry.
HVAC-grade treated water plus PG/EG glycol and standard corrosion inhibitor are compatible with polymer housing and KTW/WRAS seals.
CDU secondary is a closed pressurized loop — always full by design.
Rack secondary loops flow 5-30 l/min, above the DN20 lower detection limit of 4.2 l/min.
CDU secondary loops operate at 2-6 bar, well within the 10 bar rating.
CDU skids are compact and often have elbows near sensor ports. A flow conditioner or validated short-run calibration addresses it at low cost.
assessments.mitigation: Publish CDU-specific installation guide specifying upstream straight-run length; Offer a bolt-on flow-conditioner insert (honeycomb or perforated plate); Factory-calibrate an accuracy curve for 3 x DN upstream to support compact skid layouts

assessments.rationale: At 20-30 l/min continuous 24/7, 3,000 m3 endurance equates to ~69-104 days. Data-center duty cycle burns out the current sensor in weeks to months — the dominant commercial/engineering question for this market.
assessments.mitigation: Develop an industrial-duty DN20 variant with reinforced transducer bonding targeting >=30,000 m3 throughput; Alternatively, reposition the current sensor as a scheduled-replacement consumable aligned with annual CDU service intervals; Ship DCIM firmware that tracks cumulative throughput and fires a proactive replacement alert before drift

assessments.rationale: Data halls are not classified hazardous areas. ATEX/IECEx not required.
White-space ambient is 18-27 degC (ASHRAE A1/A2). Electronics and RAST 2.5 connector operate well within range.
